flags.message: The cell is marked forward, but the provisioned 2026-07-14 snapshot contains an explicit December 5, 2025 petition-grant entry and later argument and merits-decision entries. The forecast was reconstructed from the entries predating disposition.
The realized petition outcome was unavoidably revealed by the provisioned input. It was not used as a forecast signal, but the prediction is not blind and should be discounted accordingly.
